chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Bail App. No. S – 667 of 2023 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge Fresh case 1. For orders on MA No.5760/2023 (U/A) 2. For orders on MA No.5761/2023 (E/A) 3. For hearing of bail application 28.09.2023 Mr. Shewak Ram Valecha, Advocate for applicant/accused..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- 1. Urgency is granted. 2. Exemption is granted subject to all just legal exceptions. 3. Through this bail application, applicant/accused Ahmed Khan S/o Daim Khan Korai seeks protective bail in Crime No.342 of 2019 under Sections 302, 114, 149 PPC, registered at Police Station Moro, District Naushahro Feroze. Learned Counsel for applicant/accused contends that applicant is innocent, has been falsely implicated in this case. He further contends that applicant/accused is ready to appear before the Court concerned along with an application under Section 498 CrPC to prove his innocence, however, he apprehends his immediate arrest as non-bailable warrants has been issued against him; hence, he seeks protective bail. Without touching merits and de-merits of the case, protective bail for a period of seven days w.e.f. 28.09.2023 to 04.10.2023 (both days inclusive) is granted to applicant/accused subject to his furnishing solvent surety in the sum of Rs.50,000/- (Rupees fifty thousand) and P.R. bond in the like amount to the satisfaction of Additional Registrar of this Court. Operation of non- Cr. Bail App. No. S – 667 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforementioned period.

S – 667 of 2023 Page 2 of 2 bailable warrants in this case shall remain suspended during aforesaid period. Applicant/accused is directed to surrender before the Court concerned in the aforementioned period. This order shall cease to have its effect after expiry of above mentioned period or whenever applicant/accused surrenders before the Court concerned, which one occurs earlier. It is, however, made clear that in case applicant/accused fails to surrender before the Court concerned within stipulated period, his bail bond shall stand automatically forfeited. Criminal Bail Application stands disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E Abdul Basit
